80/20 rule is vital in trading

there cannot be more sellers than buyers —-or vice versa …that would only cause a surplus or shortage …in any auction …the real question is who is stronger …passive participants vs aggressive …the problem is big players are too good at hiding their true intentions by breaking up their large orders into small ones , making it difficult to catch the real moves
This support and resistance explanation is actually very practical… the way price reacts at these zones makes trade planning easier

orderflow series 
https://youtube.com/@metrofinanze?si=OkF2XDuOnvShjOJu

8 key areas:
1. Swing areas
2. Flip zone
3. Sweep zones- liquidity
4. Inducement- is there available liquidity?
5. Stacking of zones across time frames
6. Alignment of timeframes
7. Pricing- Premium/discount prices
8. Mitigation of zone- is it completely fresh?
